title: betula × purpusii var. typica
intro: Betula × purpusii var. typica, also known as Purpurea Birch, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the Betula genus and is a cross between the White Birch (Betula pendula) and the East Asian Birch (Betula costata). The medicinal properties of Purpurea Birch include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and soothe skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Purpurea Birch include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
